title: Universal Hobby Automatic Spring Loaded Center Punch Brass Body Hole Marker
description:
Mark holes in wood, metal, plastic, paper and more with the Universal Hobby Automatic Center Punch Tool! This spring-loaded punch will allow you to mark precise holes, and eliminates the need for a hammer. Simply position the tip on the desired spot to be marked or punched, firmly hold and press down on the body until the tip and spring mechanism releases. The punch is about 5" in total length, and it features a hardened steel tip. It also easily functions as a paper puncture or window punch in an emergency. Make sure to keep one of these handy tools around your workshop, garage or crafting area!
